title: Continuous Integration Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and configurations for Continuous Integration.

commands.description: Clone a repository from a remote server
commands.scenario: Clone a repository from a remote server

commands.description: Create a new branch and switch to it
commands.scenario: Create a new branch and switch to it

commands.description: Merge a branch into the current branch
commands.scenario: Merge a branch into the current branch

commands.description: Build a Docker image from a Dockerfile
commands.scenario: Build a Docker image from a Dockerfile

commands.description: Run a Docker container from an image
commands.scenario: Run a Docker container from an image

commands.description: Get the console output of a Jenkins job
commands.scenario: Get the console output of a Jenkins job

commands.command:
language: node_js
node_js:
  - '14'
script:
  - npm test
commands.description: Basic Travis CI configuration for a Node.js project
commands.scenario: Basic Travis CI configuration for a Node.js project

commands.command:
version: 2.1
jobs:
  build:
    docker:
      - image: circleci/python:3.8
    steps:
      - checkout
      - run: python -m unittest discover
commands.description: CircleCI configuration for a Python project
commands.scenario: CircleCI configuration for a Python project

commands.command:
name: Java CI
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v1
        with:
          java-version: '11'
      - run: mvn -B package --file pom.xml
commands.description: GitHub Actions workflow for a Java project
commands.scenario: GitHub Actions workflow for a Java project

commands.command:
steps:
  - run: npm install
  - run: npm test
  - run: npm run deploy
commands.description: Pattern for running tests before deployment
commands.scenario: Pattern for running tests before deployment

commands.description: Pattern for caching dependencies in CI
commands.scenario: Pattern for caching dependencies in CI

commands.command:
jobs:
  build:
    parallelism: 2
    steps:
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test
commands.description: Pattern for parallelizing jobs in CI
commands.scenario: Pattern for parallelizing jobs in CI
